zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de ROHAN於大約1164年出生在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾卡海可時，她的父親Alain III de Rohan30歲，母親Constance dE PENTHIèVRE29歲。她於1180年與Hervé de LÉON I結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1208年在法國享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de ROHAN于大约1164年出生在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾卡海可时，她的父亲Alain III de Rohan30岁，母亲Constance dE PENTHIèVRE29岁。她于1180年与Hervé de LÉON I结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1208年在法国享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: ROHAN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de ROHAN was born about 1164, in Carhaix, Finistère, Brittany, France, her father, Alain III de Rohan, was 30 and her mother, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, was 29. She married Hervé de LÉON I in 1180. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1208, in France, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de ROHAN est née environ 1164, à Carhaix, Finistère, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain III de Rohan, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Hervé de LÉON I en 1180. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1208, à France, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de ROHAN um 1164 in Carhaix, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alain III de Rohan 30 und ihre Mutter Constance dE PENTHIèVRE 29. Sie hat 1180 Hervé de LÉON I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1208 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de ROHAN è nata il circa 1164 nel Carhaix, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Alain III de Rohan, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Hervé de LÉON I nel 1180. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1208, nel Francia, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de ROHANが約1164年にフランスブレタグンフィニストeアカーヘイックスで生まれた時，父Alain III de Rohanは30歳，母Constance dE PENTHIèVREは29歳であった。1180年にHervé de LÉON Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1208年にフランスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de ROHAN(이)가 대략 1164년 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 카하이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alain III de Rohan(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance dE PENTHIèVRE(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1180년 Hervé de LÉON I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1208년 프랑스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de ROHAN nasceu aproximadamente 1164, em Carhaix, Finistère, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain III de Rohan, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Hervé de LÉON I em 1180. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1208, em França, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de ROHAN родилась около 1164 г. в местности кареикс, финистeр, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Alain III de Rohan было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hervé de LÉON I в 1180 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1208 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 45 лет.

sm.from 1168 to 1195: mai le 1168 e o'o I le 1195

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de ROHAN nació aproximadamente 1164, en Carhaix, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alain III de Rohan, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Constance dE PENTHIèVRE, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Hervé de LÉON I en 1180. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1208, en Francia, a la edad de 45 años.
